children.heading: General authority
children.label: a General authority
children.text: The Secretary may acquire lands and interests therein within the sites designated pursuant to section 410bbb–1(b)(1) and (3) of this title by donation or purchase with donated or appropriated funds or long term lease: , That sites designated pursuant to shall only be acquired with the consent of the owner thereof.Providedsection 410bbb–1(b)(3) of this title

children.heading: State and local properties
children.label: b State and local properties
children.text: Lands and interests in lands which are owned by the State of Louisiana, or any political subdivision thereof, may be acquired only by donation.
